analysis.consistency: The feature description is consistent with the provided table, detailing the scaling effect of the 'Destroy Undead' ability based on the cleric's level.
analysis.quality: High. The description clearly states the trigger condition (failed saving throw against Turn Undead) and the effect (instant destruction based on CR). The accompanying table is well-formatted and easy to read, accurately reflecting the scaling.
analysis.mechanics: This feature modifies the existing 'Turn Undead' feature by introducing an instant-kill condition for low-Challenge Rating undead upon a failed save. The mechanic scales linearly, providing increasing power as the cleric gains levels (5th, 8th, 11th, 14th, 17th). This strongly synergizes with and enhances a core class feature, making it a powerful tool against hordes of weak undead.

recommendations.detail: Ensure the connection to the base 'Turn Undead' feature is explicitly clear in any related documentation, as this feature is purely an enhancement of that prior ability.
